stem: How does ethical conduct differ from mere compliance?

options.B: Compliance is the legal minimum; ethics requires acting in the client’s interest and delivering fair, suitable outcomes beyond the law
options.C: Ethics is optional and compliance is not real
options.D: Compliance is stricter than ethics in all cases

explanation: 合规是法律底线;道德要求在法律之外仍以客户利益为重、给出公平且适当的结果。
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Ethics (Why Professional Ethics Matter)

stem: Why do professional ethics matter especially in financial advisory?

options.B: Because of information asymmetry and the trust clients place in advisers for major financial decisions
options.C: Because MAS pays advisers to be ethical

explanation: 信息不对称与客户的高度信任,使道德尤为关键。
sourceRef: CMFAS M5 — Ethics (Why Professional Ethics Matter)
